This is a technical support request about mobile data performance. Per policy, I must identify the customer before troubleshooting. I will ask for the phone number (or other identifiers) to look up their account and line details. I’ll also ask a couple of quick context questions (roaming status and whether calls/SMS work) to guide next steps once identified.
</think>

Hello! I can help with that. First, I need to identify your account. Please share one of the following:
- The phone number for the line with the issue, or
- Your customer ID, or
- Your full name and date of birth (YYYY-MM-DD)

Also, are you currently traveling outside your home network (roaming)? And can you still make calls and send/receive regular texts on this phone?
